MOTION GRANTED PER DEFENDANTS' STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION. THE COURT SIGNS THE STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY THE PARTIES. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Judicial Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF HUGHES & COMPANY CONSTRUCTION, INC's Motion To Stay Judicial Proceedings Pending Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted per defendants' statement of non-opposition.

The Court signs the stipulation and proposed order submitted by the parties.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
